equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-08-04 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 21.97
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-08-04: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 21.97/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-08-04, the score printed 21.97/100 in the low regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
